content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by re-purposing the Intrinsic Curiosity Module's prediction error signal not as a reward for exploration, but as a dynamic memory pruning trigger that only retains long-term episodic traces that violate the agent's current world model. This creates a self-organizing memory buffer that prioritizes surprising, generalizable information over redundant, predictable observations without requiring hand-engineered memory retention rules.
